title: MrMo's WarGames
body:
![banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f689c2c39f4608b91dcf451ec783178fa05de815_0.webp)

# ⚔️ MrMo's WarGames 💣 **Version:** Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge) **Modloader:** Forge ## 🌌 Description In **MrMo's WarGames**, multiple teams compete against each other. Each player equips themselves with modern weapons from Tac Zero, commands powerful tanks, fighter jets and helicopters from SuperB Warfare, and battles for supremacy on epic battlefields. To ensure that the gaming experience is not only exciting but also enjoyable, well-designed quality-of-life mods provide comfort, performance and the necessary fine-tuning. ## 🚀 Key Features - Epic landscapes thanks to **Tectonic** – perfect for large battles. - Modern weapons and equipment with **Tac Zero**. - Pure war machines: tanks, jets and helicopters via **SuperBWarfare**. - Comfort and gameplay improvements through QoL mods. - Team vs. team gameplay – strategy, tactics and cooperation are decisive. ## 🎮 Multiplayer Ready Includes **Simple Voice Chat** and **Open Parties and Claims** for seamless co-op play. ## 📦 Notable 👉 This project combines the best aspects of Minecraft exploration and modern warfare. Whether as infantry, pilot or tank driver – here, every team writes its own war story.
